entries.title: CRAWL SPEED CHECKPOINT AUDIT
verified_against: extension crawl path is crawl.js crawlVisibleFacebookPosts (not the no-scroll CDPRuntime.FetchBatch)
in-flight heartbeat carries only {stage,fetched,max,source_url} (notifications.go NotifyCrawlProgress)
crawl.js live loop does not consume proof.js/facebook-state.js/outbox.js checkpoint classification
org_crawl_intents cursor exists in both sqlite baseline and platform postgres 0108 (dialect-aware store)
entries.notes: PR-C0 audit-only investigation of facebook_crawl extension-path stall (slow scroll pacing + missing live checkpoint-signal surfacing). Maps flow, gives measured hypothesis table, ranks safe PR-C1 follow-ups. No runtime change.

entries.title: FACEBOOK CRAWL CAMPAIGN POSTGRES SCHEMA IMPLEMENTATION
verified_against: PR-M2B: migrations 0112-0117 apply via store.New boot path (internal/store/migrator.go: run-once; accounts anchor is a non-transactional CONCURRENTLY build)
accounts(id BIGSERIAL, org_id BIGINT) had no (org_id,id) anchor pre-0112; leads(id BIGSERIAL, org_id BIGINT) has none (lead-provenance FK deferred)
real-PostgreSQL constraint tests gated on POSTGRES_PLATFORM_TEST_DSN (internal/store/facebook_crawl_*_test.go)
forward-only runner, no down migrations (internal/store/migrations/README.md)
entries.notes: PR-M2B PostgreSQL platform schema for multi-group fresh-lead crawl: facebook_crawl_campaigns, campaign account pool, campaign sources, append-only facebook_crawl_runs ledger (lifecycle CHECKs + partial-unique active/open/retry/task idempotency), facebook_crawl_lead_index identity. Runtime-inert (no scheduler/API/store consumer/SQLite). accounts(org_id,id) anchor added deterministically; lead-provenance FK deferred until leads gains a separately reviewed (org_id,id) anchor. Constraint tests require CI (POSTGRES_PLATFORM_TEST_DSN) and must run without skip before merge. Implements the schema for multi-group-fresh-lead-crawl-spec (PR-M0).

entries.title: FACEBOOK CRAWL CODE ORGANIZATION BLUEPRINT
verified_against: companion to facebook-crawl-campaign-postgres-schema-implementation (PR-M2B) and multi-group-fresh-lead-crawl-spec (PR-M0)
planned owners exist on main: internal/store/crawl/, cmd/scraper/crawl_scheduler.go, internal/server/agent/crawlingest/, internal/session/allocator.go
authorizes no runtime code in PR-M2B

PR-M3C (2026-07-22): ApplyRunResult shipped in internal/store/crawlrun (apply.go/apply_classify.go/apply_types.go) with pure + real-PostgreSQL fencing/idempotency/rollback/concurrency tests; §11 transaction contract realized; PR-M4 wiring still absent

PR-M4A (2026-07-22): orchestrator core + fenced dispatch shipped default-off — pure crawlcampaign.Orchestrator over consumer ports (orchestrator.go/ports.go) doing enqueue -> eligibility/readiness -> atomic slot reservation -> claim -> dispatch -> recover; crawlrun ActiveCampaignPools/DispatchInfo read adapters; cmd/scraper adapters + FRESH_LEAD_CAMPAIGNS_ENABLED (default false, Postgres-only fail-closed) wiring sharing the Account Safety machine budget; the shared machine slot is acquired atomically via Coordinator.TryMarkRunning (single-critical-section check-and-mark) so a concurrent legacy+campaign reservation cannot double the budget, pinned by coordinator + two-scheduler interleaving regression tests; pre-claim safety+readiness gate prevents retry storms; RFC3339Nano fresh-cutoff correlation; ApplyRunResult boundary untouched; result-ingest/freshness deferred to PR-M5
entries.notes: Companion runtime code-organization blueprint for PR-M3..PR-M5 (runtime ownership, dependency direction, atomic ports, transaction/rollout seams). Docs-only; authorizes no runtime code in PR-M2B. Planned durable store boundary internal/store/crawl. Layers on the PR-M2B schema (facebook-crawl-campaign-postgres-schema-implementation) and multi-group-fresh-lead-crawl-spec.

entries.title: Multi-Group Fresh-Lead Crawl — Rejected Designs
verified_against: spec IA sprint 1 (2026-07-13): content-preserving extraction from multi-group-fresh-lead-crawl-spec §13
entries.notes: Twelve binding rejected alternatives (client-clock cutoff, ambiguous-timestamp trust, rotation patterns, queue frameworks, ...), each with the reason it must not come back.

entries.title: Multi-Group Fresh-Lead Crawl — Rollout PR Plan
verified_against: spec IA sprint 1 (2026-07-13): content-preserving extraction from multi-group-fresh-lead-crawl-spec §11 + rollback; PR-M2 shipped as PR-M2B migrations 0112-0117
PR-M3C (2026-07-22): M3 row complete — M3A domain/policy, M3B queue/lifecycle store, M3C atomic ApplyRunResult all shipped dormant; M4 scheduler wiring onward not yet built

PR-M4A (2026-07-22): orchestrator core + fenced dispatch shipped default-off (FRESH_LEAD_CAMPAIGNS_ENABLED, Postgres-only) — the campaign scheduler now enqueues/selects/claims/dispatches/recovers over the merged M3B/M3C store and CALLS the shared Account Safety Coordinator; legacy single-intent path untouched; result-ingest (M5) and operator UI (M6) not yet built
entries.notes: PR train M0-M6 for the fresh-lead crawl runtime. M0 (spec), M2B (schema), M3B (store mechanics), M4A (default-off orchestrator core) merged; M4B enablement / M5 result-ingest / M6 operator UI not yet built.

entries.title: Multi-Group Fresh-Lead Crawl — Technical Contract
verified_against: crawl.js emits posted_at:'' — post timestamps not extracted today (content/crawl.js)
dedup layers exist: crawl.js dedupKey/seen Set + posts.dedup_hash UNIQUE insert-or-ignore (internal/store/crawl/posts.go)
org_crawl_intents cursor/next_run_at exists on platform postgres 0108; no multi-group campaign grouping
session.Allocator PolicySticky per-account lease exists (internal/session/allocator.go)
layers on crawler-account-safety-spec (PR-C0.5) state machine/budgets/cooldown
entries.notes: PR-M0 docs-only spec for multi-group fresh-lead crawl orchestration: org-scoped campaign/queue over an account pool (1 account = max 1 active crawl, org-scoped partial-unique-index backstop on facebook_crawl_runs), server-defined fresh_cutoff_at/now_utc, canonical TimestampParse DTO (posted_at/confidence/earliest_utc/latest_utc) parser->wire->gate, strict provably-fresh window rule (earliest_utc >= cutoff), frontier streak reset on ambiguous/unknown, 3-layer dedupe incl. additive facebook_crawl_lead_index (leads table untouched), org-scoped composite FKs incl. account-pool membership anchored to accounts(org_id,id) (nullable account columns, no sentinel 0; running requires non-NULL account via CHECK), waiting_for_connector_upgrade as open run status, append-only idempotent retry lineage (retry_of_run_id + single-retry unique index) + (run_id, attempt) write fencing, PR-M1..M6 rollout train. Layers on crawler-account-safety-spec; no evasion, no runtime change. Split 2026-07-13 (spec IA sprint 1): business/experience layers extracted to experiences/fresh-lead-discovery/, rollout + rejected-designs extracted beside this contract, stale inline DDL replaced by a pointer to the shipped postgres-schema.md.
